fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Shows the name of the journal template that the journal batch is set up under.
The program automatically retrieves the name from the Name field in the Item Journal Template table.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item journal you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a brief description of the item journal batch you are creating.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign document numbers to ledger entries that are posted from this journal batch.

fields.name: Template Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the item journal template, such as item adjustment, transfer, output, or capacity.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the item journal template is a recurring journal.
Recurring journals can be useful when you have entries that must be posted repeatedly with few or no changes.
With a recurring journal, entries that are posted regularly have to be entered only once. The accounts, dimensions, and dimension values that you enter in the fields stay in the journal after posting. If any adjustments are necessary, then you can make them with each posting.
A recurring journal opens in a special window that contains standard fields and special fields in which you can define which entries are repeated and how they are repeated.
Select the check box to make the journal a recurring journal.
The following fields are designed for recurring journals:
Recurring Method

Expiration Date

Recurring Frequency

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this journal batch.

fields.name: Item Tracking on Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies if item tracking can be selected directly on the item journal lines.
